title: Relative clauses with subjunctive
subtitle: Look for something that may or may not exist.
overview: Use indicative for a known thing.
Use subjunctive for an unknown or desired thing.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Busco un hotel que sea barato.
I am looking for a hotel that is cheap.
Tengo un hotel que es barato.
I have a hotel that is cheap.
I need someone who helps me.

items.es: Busco un apartamento que esté cerca del centro.
items.en: I am looking for an apartment that is near downtown.

items.es: Necesito una mochila que no sea muy cara.
items.en: I need a backpack that is not very expensive.

items.es: Quiero un trabajo que me permita viajar.
items.en: I want a job that allows me to travel.

items.es: Conozco un café que abre temprano.
items.en: I know a cafe that opens early.

items.es: No encuentro a nadie que pueda ayudarme ahora.
items.en: I cannot find anyone who can help me now.
